name: treeline
description: Chat with your finances. Query balances, spending, budgets, and transactions from your local Treeline database.
long_description: Treeline Money is a local-first personal finance app backed by DuckDB. This extension gives Claude direct access to your financial data — query balances, analyze spending, track budgets, tag transactions, and sync from your bank. All data stays on your device.

tools.name: status
tools.description: Get account summary including balances, transaction counts, and connected integrations.

tools.name: query
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL query against the DuckDB database for financial analysis.

tools.name: query_write
tools.description: Execute a SQL query with write access (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, CREATE TABLE).

tools.name: sync
tools.description: Sync accounts and transactions from connected bank integrations.

tools.name: demo
tools.description: Manage demo mode with sample financial data.

tools.name: skills_read
tools.description: Read a file from a skill directory.
